caption:
✅ on my Dubai Bucket List! 

Thanks to the staff of Address Beach Resort for the warm hospitality and for making this dream come true. This lounge is exclusive to guests and has a minimum spend, but they were so kind to give us access after having our summer afternoon tea at The Lounge. 🥰 

Watch our full vlog on YouTube - Life with Lady Anne.

📍Zeta Seventy Seven @addressbeachresort
